name_en: Top-tier Original M80695 Leopard Print Screen Print Three-Piece Set MULTI POCHETTE FÉLICIE Three-in-One. The main bag can fit the largest iPhone. It has an inner compartment and three card slots. The small card case can be detached and used alone in other bags or hung anywhere. The adjustable wide shoulder strap allows for shoulder or crossbody carrying. A perfect combination of practicality and style. Size: 17x9.6x3.5cm
